name: io.github.forge-space/branding-mcp
description: AI-powered brand identity generation via MCP with design tokens, typography, and logo assets.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables natural-language brand refinement with Anthropic when the AI strategy is selected.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Transport mode: 'stdio' (default) or 'http' for HTTP/SSE transport.

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Optional. HTTP port when MCP_TRANSPORT=http. Defaults to 3000.
